uses: Atkinsia cubensis, also known as the Cuban laurel, is a plant species that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The leaves of this plant are used to treat digestive issues and fever, while its roots are used to treat respiratory problems. Atkinsia cubensis is also believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling. Additionally, the plant is used to treat wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. Its medicinal uses have been passed down through generations in traditional Cuban medicine.
